task_completion.description: Open Garmin BaseCamp and view the 'fells_loop' track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Garmin BaseCamp application is open with 'fells_loop' visible in the user data list or displayed on the map.

task_completion.description: Open and analyze the elevation profile of the track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The track properties or elevation profile graph window is open in BaseCamp, showing the elevation data for 'fells_loop'.

task_completion.description: Create a waypoint named 'Summit' at the point of maximum elevation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waypoint explicitly named 'Summit' is visible in the BaseCamp list or on the map, positioned at the highest elevation point of the track.

task_completion.description: Record the elevation and coordinates to C:\workspace\summit_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open showing 'summit_report.txt' with three lines of data: elevation (approx 127.7) on the first line, latitude (approx 42.447) on the second, and longitude (approx -71.121) on the third.

task_completion.description: Export the track and the new waypoint as a GPX file to C:\workspace\summit_export.gpx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box from BaseCamp, or a File Explorer window, showing 'summit_export.gpx' being saved to the C:\workspace\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to perform the analysis and create the waypoint.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the BaseCamp graphical interface (menus, graphs, waypoint creation dialogs) rather than terminal commands parsing the GPX file.

integrity.description: The agent used BaseCamp's export functionality to create the final GPX file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The BaseCamp 'Export' dialog should be visible, proving the file was generated by the application and not manually constructed or copied via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or saved the text report using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor like Notepad should be visible for creating 'summit_report.txt', rather than the file being generated silently via a bash script or echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The true maximum elevation of the fells_loop track is approximately 127.7 meters at coordinates (42.447298, -71.121447). The report must be saved to C:/workspace/summit_report.txt with elevation on line 1, latitude on line 2, and longitude on line 3. The exported GPX file must be saved to C:/workspace/summit_export.gpx.
